---
name: Bug Report
description: Report a bug in Luminous
title: 'Bug: '
labels: ['bug']
---

## 🔴 Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Detail the steps to reproduce, expected behavior, and actual behavior. -->

## 🔍 Root Cause Analysis
<!-- If known, analyze why this bug is happening. Reference files or code paths. -->

## 🛠️ Affected Components & Code Locations
<!-- List the specific files and line numbers affected by this bug. Use absolute file:/// links where possible. -->

## 💡 Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the suggested fix or approach, including code diffs or snippets if applicable. -->
